query:
ALTER TABLE send_logs 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS userId INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS platform VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS messageContent TEXT NULL;
